description: Letter of ʿEli ha-Mumḥe (‘the Adept’) b. Abraham in Jerusalem, to Efrayim b. Shemarya in Fusṭāṭ, with the continuation and, inverted, the address on verso. Dating: 1045 CE (per Gil) and ca. 1007–1055 CE, based on the years when Efrayim b. Shemarya was active. Also on verso, Arabic jottings, part of which are written transversely across the page. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב מאלי המומחה בן אברהם, ירושלים, לאפרים בן שמריה, פוסטאט, 1045.
